title: Threadwork NERS 'horizontal-E STRONG-PASS: TS table verbatim, zero divergence' is overstated
claim: ners_alldirections_threadwork_2026-06-11 §1 grades horizontal-E a STRONG PASS on the claim that the TS visibility table (threadwork_v30 §2.3) is consumed 'verbatim ... zero divergence' by combat §10.2, social §9.4b, investigation ED-680. Against source: band THRESHOLDS match (0-9/10-29/30-49/50+), so the *consistency* claim holds -- but the table is NOT verbatim. combat_v30 §10.2 (l.446-449) rewords every cell ('Vague unease at violence', 'thread disruption at wound site', 'structural depth of wound') and collapses 50-69/70+ into a single '50+'; social_contest_v30 §9.4b (l.467) is a 3-band PROSE reference ('TS 30+ perceives the operation'), not the table. The audit's own NULL-scan ('values match') missed the wording/band differences. Downgrade cell STRONG-PASS -> PASS (consistent thresholds, non-verbatim text).
action: Correct ners_alldirections §1 horizontal-E cell to PASS; optional doc-consistency: have the 3 consumers cross-reference the canonical §2.3 table rather than restate it
